name: Kenny no Ojii-san
description:
__Relatives:__ [Kenny Ackerman](https://anilist.co/character/127443), [Kuchel Ackerman](https://anilist.co/character/127940) (Granddaughter) 

The grandfather of [Kenny](https://anilist.co/character/127443) and [Kuchel Ackerman](https://anilist.co/character/127940). He was one of the few living remnants of the Ackerman bloodline with knowledge about the reasons for the persecution of his clan.
